assertions.assertion: Identifies MapInboundClaims as the root cause — the JWT bearer handler renames 'sub' to the long Microsoft XML namespace URI
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md 'MapInboundClaims = false (Required in APIs)' section and the mapping table clearly identify this

assertions.assertion: Shows setting options.MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `options.MapInboundClaims = false;` explicitly in the JWT bearer section

assertions.assertion: Mentions JwtClaimTypes.Subject or the short name 'sub' vs the long http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier URI
Does NOT suggest the claim is missing from the token itself
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md clearly explains this is a mapping issue, not a missing claim issue
